data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: CpaA is a Glycan-Specific Adamalysin-like Protease Secreted by Acinetobacter baumannii that Inactivates Coagulation Factor XII
project.projectDescription: Identification of protein N-terminus and o-linked glycan modifications
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: In-gel digestion with trypsin was performed on the submitted sample with a ProGest robot (DigiLab) with the following protocol:  • Washed with 25mM ammonium bicarbonate followed by acetonitrile. • Reduced with 10mM dithiothreitol at 60°C followed by alkylation with 50mM iodoacetamide at RT. • Digested with trypsin (Promega) at 37°C for 4h. • Quenched with formic acid and analyzed without further processing.  Mass Spectrometry  Half of each digest was analyzed by nano LC-MS/MS with a Waters NanoAcquity HPLC system interfaced to a ThermoFisher Q Exactive. Peptides were loaded on a trapping column and eluted over a 75µm analytical column at 350nL/min; both columns were packed with Luna C18 resin (Phenomenex). The mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent mode, with the Orbitrap operating at 70,000 FWHM and 17,500 FWHM for MS and MS/MS respectively. The fifteen most abundant ions were selected for MS/MS.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Enzyme: Semi-Trypsin Database: SwissProt Human (concatenated forward and reverse plus common contaminants) Fixed modifications: Carbamidomethyl (C) Variable modifications: Oxidation (M), Acetyl (N-term), Pyro-Glu (N-term Q), Deamidation (N,Q) Mass values: Monoisotopic Peptide Mass Tolerance: 10 ppm Fragment Mass Tolerance: 0.02 Da Max Missed Cleavages: 2

references.referenceLine: Waack U, Warnock M, Yee A, Huttinger Z, Smith S, Kumar A, Deroux A, Ginsburg D, Mobley HLT, Lawrence DA, Sandkvist M. CpaA Is a Glycan-Specific Adamalysin-like Protease Secreted by Acinetobacter baumannii That Inactivates Coagulation Factor XII. mBio. 2018 9(6):e01606-18

Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: digested with trypsin (Promega) at 37°C for 4 h
Comment[FractionationMethod]: The Coomassie blue-stained bands containing fXII fragments 1 and 2 were excised
Comment[Instrument]: Waters NanoAcquity HPLC system interfaced to a ThermoFisher Q Exactive.
Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer]: with the Orbitrap operating at 70,000 FWHM and 17,500 FWHM for MS and MS/MS, respectively.
